note: Surface triage for EigenLayer DelegationManager (v1.12.0 impl 0xe7022a...bce75, post-ELIP-002). EVERY external-mutating selector in the snapshot appears here with explicit cover|exclude (gate I1). Delegation + queued-withdrawal lifecycle is the heart of the restaking permission surface. signed_structs holds the off-chain DelegationApproval EIP-712 grant.

0xeea9064b.name: delegateTo
0xeea9064b.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive — staker delegates ALL deposited restaking shares to an operator. (address operator, SignatureWithExpiry approverSignatureAndExpiry, bytes32 approverSalt). Dambi's core target; never exclude.

0xa33a3433.name: redelegate
0xa33a3433.reason: PERMISSION DELEGATION primitive (NEW) — undelegate from current operator and delegate to a new one in one call. Same risk surface as delegateTo.

0xda8be864.name: undelegate
0xda8be864.reason: user action — undelegate from operator; queues a withdrawal of all delegated shares. Revokes the delegation grant.

0x0dd8dd02.name: queueWithdrawals
0x0dd8dd02.reason: user-fund-move — queue withdrawal of staked shares (QueuedWithdrawalParams[] {strategies, depositShares, withdrawer}). Post-ELIP-002 shape (depositShares, no nonce in input). Start of the withdraw flow.

0xe4cc3f90.name: completeQueuedWithdrawal
0xe4cc3f90.reason: user-fund-move — complete a single queued withdrawal (Withdrawal struct, tokens[], receiveAsTokens). Releases funds back to the staker.

0x9435bb43.name: completeQueuedWithdrawals
0x9435bb43.reason: user-fund-move — batch complete queued withdrawals (Withdrawal[], tokens[][], receiveAsTokens[]).

0x2aa6d888.name: registerAsOperator
0x2aa6d888.reason: permission/role — caller registers as an EigenLayer operator (initDelegationApprover, allocationDelay, metadataURI). Operators are users; this is an operator pre-sign onboarding action.

0x54b7c96c.name: modifyOperatorDetails
0x54b7c96c.reason: permission-grant — operator sets its delegationApprover (who must co-sign stakers delegating to it). (address operator, address newDelegationApprover). Changes who can approve delegations = permission config.

0x78296ec5.name: updateOperatorMetadataURI
0x78296ec5.reason: DEFERRED/cosmetic — updateOperatorMetadataURI only changes the operator's metadata URI string; no fund-move and no permission/scope change. Out of round-1 scope (operator metadata).

0x60a0d1ce.name: decreaseDelegatedShares
0x60a0d1ce.reason: infra/onlyEigenPodManager — internal share accounting callback when beacon-chain balance decreases. Not user-callable.

0x3c651cf2.name: increaseDelegatedShares
0x3c651cf2.reason: infra/onlyStrategyManagerOrEigenPodManager — internal share accounting callback on deposit. Not user-callable directly.

0x5ae679a7.name: slashOperatorShares
0x5ae679a7.reason: infra/onlyAllocationManager — burns slashed operator shares; invoked by AllocationManager during slashing, not by a wallet.

DelegationApproval.reason: off-chain EIP-712 message the operator's delegationApprover SIGNS to authorize a specific staker delegating to the operator. typehash DelegationApproval(address delegationApprover,address staker,address operator,bytes32 salt,uint256 expiry) (0x14bde674...2dad, from verified DelegationManagerStorage.sol). Domain {name:'EigenLayer', version:'1', chainId:1, verifyingContract: DelegationManager proxy}. Consumed by delegateTo's approverSignatureAndExpiry param — a permission grant gating who may delegate, Dambi's core off-chain target.
